indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can improve mood and productivity.

indicators.name: Concrete surfaces
indicators.rationale: Concrete surfaces are durable but may be cold to touch.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work due to its large open area and natural lighting, although the concrete surfaces might be less comfortable.
